| 7 | `Verify: Migrate auth to OAuth2 + PKCE: fix oauth-migration` | `acme/mobile#1030` | ENG-124 |
| 8 | `Verify: Image uploads time out over 5MB: add test for image-uploads` | `acme/infra#1033` | ENG-147 |
| 9 | `Verify: SSO SCIM provisioning errors: refactor sso-provisioning` | `acme/web#1037` | ENG-102 |
